name: Context Assembly Protocol
description: Protocol for assembling and prioritizing context information
prompt:
Assemble context for code analysis following this protocol:

1. File metadata (path, language, size)
2. Import/dependency analysis
3. Function/class signatures
4. Related files in the same module
5. Project configuration context
6. Previous analysis results if available

Prioritize context by relevance to the current task. Truncate least relevant context if token limits approached.
